raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1; there is sufficient clearance to apply gentle lateral constraint to prevent box_2 from lifting due to the attached_to connection.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally constrained by the left end-effector, reducing risk of box_2 moving when box_1 is lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both end-effectors have free access to the left and right side faces of box_1; the grasp does not require the claw since box_1 is 30x30x30 cm (too large for the claw) and can be secured by bilateral side contact; box_2 remains stabilized to mitigate attachment-induced motion.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held between both end-effectors with symmetric lateral contact and is under robot control."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is already clamped; vertical clearance above box_1 is sufficient to lift without contacting the table; lifting is performed slowly to monitor any coupled motion from the attached_to relationship with box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is lifted off the tabletop and held securely in the air by both arms (picked up)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1; there is sufficient clearance to apply gentle lateral constraint to prevent box_2 from lifting due to the attached_to connection.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally constrained by the left end-effector, reducing risk of box_2 moving when box_1 is lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both end-effectors have free access to the left and right side faces of box_1; the grasp does not require the claw since box_1 is 30x30x30 cm (too large for the claw) and can be secured by bilateral side contact; box_2 remains stabilized to mitigate attachment-induced motion.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held between both end-effectors with symmetric lateral contact and is under robot control.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is already clamped; vertical clearance above box_1 is sufficient to lift without contacting the table; lifting is performed slowly to monitor any coupled motion from the attached_to relationship with box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is lifted off the tabletop and held securely in the air by both arms (picked up).
